guarantee.meaning_of_pass: The provided structured input satisfies the selected Rego policy under the supplied data model.
guarantee.meaning_of_fail: The policy produced one or more violations for the supplied input.
guarantee.meaning_of_unknown: The adapter could not parse or evaluate the required input.

assumptions: Input extraction faithfully represents the repository state relevant to the policy.
Policy templates accurately encode the intended invariant.
limits: Does not prove properties of arbitrary program execution.
